title: GitHub closed issues and PRs crawler supplement manifest 2026-07-01
scope_note: Page-level crawler Markdown snapshots produced by scheduled GitHub closed issue/PR source runs; supplements curated API corpora and earlier 2026-06-29 browser snapshots.
